file_info.description: The FMCSA New Entrant Safety Assurance Program out of service (OOS) data, consists of all entities that have received an OOS order from FMCSA. One OOS order per row.

data_elements.definition: US DOT Number of the entity.
Legal name of the entity assigned a USDOT number.
This may be a trade name under which the entity does business. Any name identifying the entity other than the legal name.
Date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the OOS order was issued to the entity.
Reason the OOS order was issued to the entity.

Status of the USDOT number of the entity. (ACTIVE/INACTIVE) Note: An Active USDOT number does not indicate an entity has the authority to operate. In other words, an entity could be placed OOS and still have an active USDOT number.
Date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the OOS order was rescinded.
